'''''Star Wars Official Poster Monthly'' 1''' was published in October [[1977]] by [[Paradise Press]].

None of the authors or editors were credited in this issue.

{{Magazine-stub|issue}}

==Contents==
*"Birth of a Space Legend": an introduction to the magazine.
*"Heroes & Villains": Brief profiles of [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]], [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Ben Kenobi]], [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]], [[Grand Moff/Legends|Grand Moff]] [[Wilhuff Tarkin/Legends|Tarkin]], [[R2-D2/Legends|R2-D2]], [[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]], [[Princess/Legends|Princess]] [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]], [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]], and [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]].
